positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a sleepy fox wearing a tiny wizard hat, sitting amongst glowing bioluminescent mushrooms in a deep forest glen. Highly detailed, fantasy art, Studio Ghibli inspired, warm ambient lighting, cinematic, soft texture, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, aggressive, hyper-realistic, modern digital art
